body.title: CLOSED: rename agent_datacenter/db.py → db_proxy.py
body.result: renamed db.py→db_proxy.py; both shims point to agent_datacenter.db_proxy; pre-import fix for module cache poisoning in tests
body.description:
agent_datacenter/db.py produces logger name agent_datacenter.db, which looks like a SQLite file reference. Rename to db_proxy.py so logger reads agent_datacenter.db_proxy.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/agent_datacenter/db.py (rename), agent_datacenter/tests/test_dc_db.py (5 import refs), agent_datacenter/examples/chat_agent/agent.py (1 import + 1 comment), TheIgors/tests/test_d126_postgres.py (4 patch refs), TheIgors/wild_igor/igor/memory/db_proxy.py (import + docstring), TheIgors/lab/utility_closet/db_proxy.py (import + docstring)
**Design rules:** none apply — pure rename, no logic changes
**Scope boundary:** rename + import updates only; zero logic changes; public API identical
**Test plan:** all existing TheIgors + ADC tests pass; logger name in slow-query output changes to agent_datacenter.db_proxy
